CC0 Flat Guns West
Author: Pichuliru (https://pichuliru.itch.io)
Source: https://opengameart.org/content/cc0-flat-guns-west
        (also published at https://pichuliru.itch.io/cc0-flat-guns-west)
Archive: flat_guns_west.zip, retrieved 2026-07-24

License: CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/

Author's note on the source page: "attribution isn't required but
greatly appreciated." Credit retained here as provenance and thanks.

Files: unmodified GLB exports from the upstream archive (the zip also
ships Blend/FBX/OBJ variants, not vendored). 10 guns based on
US/European designs; every model is skinned to a rig with functional
bones (Slide, Bolt, Magazine, Pump, Charging Handle, Trigger, sights)
plus Attach_* sockets for scopes/rails/muzzle attachments. No baked
animation clips - parts are posed by rotating/translating the bones.
